text:
Created attachment 168179
svn diff for mail/mbox2imap (patch)

mail/mbox2imap is currently marked BROKEN
This pr(1) provides a new MASTER_SITES to correct that.

Changes
MASTER_SITES

removes "workarounds" in Makefile)
distinfo
MAINTAINER

That's it!

A build log is also included, in case anyone cares. :)

Thanks!

Currently maintained by ports@ -- implicit (patch) approval
